title: GENM-049 Take it with alcohol-Make an aphrodisiac and get an erection-Haruka Takami
description: At the girls bar, when he enjoys drinking alcohol, Takami makes a man take an erection medicine, and he listens to recent sexual circumstances and seduces a frustrated partner. Takami who sees a man whose erection cannot be suppressed points out the erection cock and begins to seduce. What is the fate of a man who lost pleasure? ..
